command: pwd && ls -la && for f in SOUL.md USER.md MEMORY.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && { echo "--- $f ---"; sed -n '1,220p' "$f"; }; done && d=$(date -u +%F); y=$(date -u -d 'yesterday' +%F); for f in memory/$d.md memory/$y.md; do [ -f "$f" ] && { echo "--- $f ---"; sed -n '1,220p' "$f"; }; done

echo '--- ~/.ssh/config ---'; [ -f ~/.ssh/config ] && sed -n '1,240p' ~/.ssh/config || echo 'No ~/.ssh/config'; echo '--- workspace git status ---'; git status --short --branch || true; echo '--- recent files ---'; find . -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | tail -n 200
